message:
chore(config): Add COOP/COEP headers and update build configs

Add required security headers for SharedArrayBuffer support and update
build configurations for optimal performance.

vercel.json - Security Headers:
- Add Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin
- Add Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp
- Required for SharedArrayBuffer in browsers
- Applied to all routes via source: "/(.*)"

tsconfig.json Updates:
- Add path alias for @phage/wasm-compute → packages/wasm-compute/pkg
- Ensure consistent module resolution across packages
- Enable strict mode for better type checking

vite.config.ts Optimizations:
- Configure worker format for better bundling
- Add WASM file handling
- Optimize chunk splitting for async components
- Enable source maps for production debugging

App.tsx Updates:
- Lazy load heavy components
- Add Suspense boundaries for better loading UX
- Optimize initial bundle size

Mobile ControlDeck.tsx:
- Minor UI refinements for touch targets
- Optimize re-render behavior

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
